Landing.hero_badge: The new era of football social networking
Landing.hero_desc: Experience explosive emotions with millions of fans. Live scores, analysis, predictions, and pure passion.
Landing.gallery_desc: Scroll to feel the heartbeat from the blazing stands.
Landing.feat_1_desc: Ultra-fast live scores, cards, and substitutions.
Landing.feat_2_desc: Mini social network for clubs. Create groups, discuss deeply.
Landing.feat_3_desc: Earn XP through correct predictions and climb the ranks.
Landing.feat_4_desc: Keep lifelong memories of matches you've watched.
Landing.feat_5_desc: Chat live with thousands of fans during the match.
Landing.feat_6_desc: Personalized season review reflecting your unique footprint.
Landing.premium_desc: Elevate your football experience with exclusive perks for VIP members.
Landing.faq_desc: Frequently asked questions from the PitchGrid community.
Landing.faq_a1: Yes! You can use most core features like live scores, communities, and chat for free forever. Premium only provides cosmetic perks and removes prediction limits.
Landing.faq_q2: How do I create a fan community for my team?
Landing.faq_a2: Simple! After logging in, go to Communities -> 'Create'. If your team doesn't have an official group yet, you can become the founding Admin!
Landing.faq_q3: How does the XP and Prediction system work?
Landing.faq_a3: Before each match, you can predict the outcome (Win/Draw/Loss or exact score). If correct, you earn XP to climb the Global Fan Leaderboard and unlock rare badges.
Landing.faq_a4: We use world-class sports APIs with under 1 second delay compared to live action. You might even know about a goal before your TV shows it.
Landing.faq_support_desc: Our team is always ready to assist you 24/7.
Landing.footer_copy: © 2026 PitchGrid. Built for the passion of football.

Auth.login_desc: Login to continue your football journey
Auth.tagline: Join millions of football fans worldwide
